name: Jewel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, egg yolk, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the flour until just combined.
3. Refrigerate the dough for 1 hour.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
5. Using your hands, roll the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Dip each ball in the beaten egg white, then roll in pecans.
7. Place the cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 5 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and use the end of a wooden spoon to make a small indentation in the center of each cookie.
10. Return the cookies to the oven and bake for another 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Transfer the cookies to a wire rack to cool.
12. Fill the indentations with a dot of powdered sugar frosting.
13. While the cookies are still warm, place a rounded edge of a maraschino cherry in the center. Jelly may also be used in the centers.
